mapper.select: select ma.id, fin.amount_range as finAmountRange, ma.amount_range as matchAmountRange, JSON_LENGTH(ma.product_ids) as productCount, fin.created_at as matchTime from yw_match_records ma left join yw_financing_intentions fin on ma.intention_id = fin.id where ma.deleted = 0 and ma.user_open_id = #{openid} and ma.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} order by ma.id desc
